compounds.frequency: before bed, 2-3 hours after a meal
before bed, 2-3 hours after a meal

side_effects.description: Flushing/histamine-like reaction for first 5-10 minutes after injection; vascular system opening up, momentarily lowers blood pressure
Injection sites swell up and get slightly itchy like a mosquito bite for the first hour

One incident of dangerously low blood pressure after combining with Tadalafil while dehydrated; instantly vomited from nausea and heart rate went up to 140s resting for about 30 minutes. No long term damage.
Instantly vomited during the low blood pressure incident

protocol_notes: Used CJC no DAC + Ipamorelin for 3 months. Pins before bed 2-3 hours after a meal. The severe reaction was a one-time event attributed to concurrent Tadalafil use and dehydration while also taking creatine and liquid glycerol. Notes that staying hydrated is critical and to be cautious about other vasodilating compounds.
